title: Games of the Past

categories.label: War & strategy
categories.note: Capture, position and territory — soldiers, stones and kings on a grid of squares or lines.

categories.label: Hunt & siege
categories.note: Asymmetric games: a few strong pieces against a swarm of weak ones.

categories.label: Race & tables
categories.note: Dice-driven race games — counters around a track, ancestors of backgammon and ludo.

categories.label: Sowing
categories.note: The mancala family — sow and capture seeds around a board of pits.

categories.label: Alignment
categories.note: Make a line of three — the morris and merels games scratched the world over.

categories.label: Dice & lots
categories.note: Gambling with knucklebones, cubes, marked beans and spinning tops.

categories.label: Hand & guess
categories.note: Quick wagering games of the hand — nothing needed but nimble fingers.

launcher.note: Play link = <base>?game=<absolute pack URL>&room=<code>. The pack is a boardgame/1.1 file under data/packs/.

footer: Made with <3 in Bologna by OpenHistoryMap
